stemHtml: The accessory gearbox of a modern turbofan engine is usually driven by...

options.a: the high-pressure compressor through a drive shaft. It has its own lubrication system
options.b: the high-pressure compressor through a drive shaft. It is connected to the lubrication system of the engine.
options.c: bleed air from the high-pressure compressor. It has its own lubrication system
options.d: bleed air from the high-pressure compressor. It is connected to the lubrication system of the engine.
